textByHashes.c4b9e903a809883f5b6066146ea767f6c81a0560: I'm waiting for my shift. I'm supposed to be digging once the others have finished.
textByHashes.9f44c19c15f31f789a2dca7c152c0c8e5312bc05: I don't like the sound of these monsters, though.
textByHashes.57ee4dbc7db7bde5c5cc1015f9b739ec0c5e033e: I heard that Donal went exploring in the caves, and saw a huge monster.
textByHashes.2ebbcce0606c37384cbbd2b878f4e307f3779000: If you want to know more about it, ask Thorodin - he's working on the excavation right now.
textByHashes.dd66829f37ddff58d24dcd3afd2a2954e596dddc: I'm waiting for my shift, of course. We can't dig all the time, you know.
textByHashes.b08891b8772cf29956c1facdde56b73526ca7fe1: I'm also researching the links between the Fremenniks and the Dwarves.
textByHashes.7cb6cf5941ed21ef02b2b6cfff2fbcec2c838de4: I've found that we have some mythology in common.
